hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.go$' && gofmt -w "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(svelte|ts|js)$' && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend" && npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
